title: AL's Dungeons Enchant Icons
description: A pack that adds Enchantment Icons in the style of Minecraft Dungeons!
body:
![dungeonsenchantmenticonslogo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/caa4bee4033790892ff9d1c7b2a02f9d2c894d66.png)

#

This pack adds Enchantment Icons in the style of Minecraft Dungeons, NO MODS REQUIRED!

This was initially inspired by the project [Minecraft Dungeons Enchantment Icons](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mickey-joes-enchantments) however, since that project was effectively abandoned as it hasn't been updated past release, so it's partially broken in newer versions, I decided to fill the niche!



**Features:**

*Enchantment Icons designs faithful to Minecraft Dungeons

*Since the pack utilizes custom font, I've added **FULL language support** for all the icons
![example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b43097e4f315d1e9afacfe83f539af35496d5e2e.png)
